changes: — sync.py v3.77 - Hash-based manifest for --update (all repo files tracked)
— sync.py v3.75→v3.76 + local sync pipeline + docs overhaul (2026-03-08) —
sync.py v3.75: --init (download full repo), --update (pull changed files from manifest), --lockfile (prevent overlapping runs), working directory awareness, manifest check on sync runs

sync.py v3.76: Bug fixes — workout summary trailing rep off-by-one (13-rep set reported as 12×30s), deload phase detection blind spot (Path C: retrospective deload from completed data when no plan exists)
manifest.json replaces changelog.json for update tracking. After updating to v3.76, sync.py reads manifest.json automatically.
New local deployment path: python3 sync.py --setup → --init → section11/examples/sync.py. No GitHub needed. See examples/json-local-sync/SETUP.md

Documentation: README restructured (GitHub/local sync as equal paths, GitHub connector table). SETUP_ASSISTANT.md rewritten (two-question routing: platform type + sync method, four valid combos). SKILL.md rewritten (three-tier file fallback). All cross-references updated.
Upgrade: replace your sync.py with the latest from github.com/CrankAddict/section-11/tree/main/examples/sync.py
